commit.subject: LU-9497 test: Enable project quota if system supports
commit.message:
LU-9497 test: Enable project quota if system supports

Add project quota to the quota type when system supports it

Change-Id: I113fbd999a13669c1bf38e4ff3f19dec391f8f24
Signed-off-by: Wei Liu <wei3.liu@intel.com>
